text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I think this is due to 10-CURRENT not having gcc by default.  I upgraded the 
port to 4.6.2 and I don't see gcc hardcoded anywhere.  Can you please update 
and try again?  If the problem persists can you send me the full output of 
make?  Thanks.
